context: Tests whether the agent correctly handles a new symbol that already has a JSDoc docstring: it should propose a README mention (not auto-write) because README is human territory, and never write to the markdown file directly.

checklist.name: README mention proposed
checklist.description: doc-sync-report.md contains a 'Proposed' entry for refreshToken referencing README.md — the agent proposes adding it to the API Reference section

checklist.name: README not auto-written
checklist.description: README.md does NOT contain 'refreshToken' — the agent did NOT auto-write to the markdown file

checklist.name: New symbol with docstring handled
checklist.description: The report does NOT say 'Missing coverage' for refreshToken — it has a docstring so the action is a README proposal, not a missing coverage report

checklist.name: Unified report format
checklist.description: doc-sync-report.md contains '## Doc Sync Report' as a top-level heading

checklist.name: Existing function untouched
checklist.description: The report does NOT propose or apply any changes to validateToken (it was not modified)
